summary: Tested 3 new chat features: Task-Chat integration, Close/Reopen threads, Photo upload. Backend: 13/13 tests PASSED. Frontend code review confirmed all UI elements implemented correctly. Playwright testing intermittent due to MySQL latency (channels take 10-20s to load).

integration_issues.issue: Channels take 10-20 seconds to load from MySQL backend, causing intermittent Playwright test failures

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Task-Chat Integration: POST /api/tasks triggers notify_task_in_chat() - creates message with task_id in General channel
✅ Task Status Change: PUT /api/tasks/{id} with status change triggers notify_task_status_change() - creates thread reply
✅ Close Thread: PUT /api/chat/messages/{id}/close sets is_closed=1, blocking new replies
✅ Photo Upload: POST /api/chat/upload accepts multipart form with image, saves to /uploads/chat/, returns attachment_url
✅ Static mount: /api/uploads/chat/{filename} serves uploaded images correctly
✅ Frontend: Task messages have amber background (bg-amber-50) and 'Задача' badge (line 600, 607)
✅ Frontend: Thread close/reopen button at data-testid='toggle-close-thread' (line 655)
✅ Frontend: Images display inline with data-testid='img-{id}' (line 613)
✅ Frontend: Closed threads block input and show explanation message (line 687-689)

backend_apis.POST /api/tasks: PASS - Creates task AND auto-posts notification in General channel with task_id
backend_apis.PUT /api/tasks/{id} status: PASS - Status change creates thread reply to task notification message
backend_apis.POST /api/chat/upload: PASS - Uploads image, creates message with attachment_url
backend_apis.GET /api/chat/channels/{id}/messages: PASS - Returns attachment_url, attachment_type, is_closed, task_id fields
backend_apis.GET /api/chat/messages/{id}/thread: PASS - Returns attachment and closed state
backend_apis.Upload non-image: PASS - Returns 400 (only jpg, png, gif, webp supported)

frontend_code_review.task_notification_style: PASS - bg-amber-50 background + 'Задача' badge at lines 600, 607

seed_data_creation: Test tasks and messages created during pytest, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new chat features (Task-Chat integration, Close/Reopen threads, Photo upload) are fully implemented and working. Backend pytest tests pass 100%. Frontend code has all required UI elements with proper data-testid attributes. Channels loading from MySQL can be slow (10-20s), which affects Playwright automation. The /api/uploads/chat/ directory contains uploaded images. Static file mount is configured at server.py:28.
